ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of fund (e.g., PRNT) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "investment_strategy" TEXT /* Investment strategy used for the portfolio (e.g., growth, value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol (e.g., XONE) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* CUSIP identifier */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., software, biotech) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_price_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last price update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the portfolio-stock entry */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trade for the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the last trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activities" (
  "trading_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading activity */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of trading activity (e.g., buy, sell, dividend, split) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading activity */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trading activity */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trading activity */,
  "trading_strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy used for the activity */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time at which the trading activity was executed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trading activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trading activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_trading_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategy ("trading_strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activities_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., portfolio manager, trader, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_access" (
  "portfolio_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio access entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access entry was last updated */,
  "access_granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_access_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_access_access_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("access_granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_payments" (
  "dividend_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the dividend payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend payment */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date for the payment */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the payment */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dividend payment (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_payments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "stock_split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1) */,
  "ex_split_date" TEXT /* Ex-split date for the split */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Record date for the split */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of the split (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "portfolio_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio performance entry */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the portfolio performance */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the portfolio */,
  "annualized_return" REAL /* Annualized return of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the portfolio */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategy" (
  "trading_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the strategy is currently active (e.g., true, false) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON column to store performance metrics of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategy_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)
